ItacAcademyItem.Name: Accesi (Accademia degli; Compagnia della Calza)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Count Da Monte composed the L`Antigono for the new theatre of the Accademia - performed on 28 February 1564.

ItacPersonItem.Name: della Rovere,Francesco Maria II,Duke of Urbino,1549-1631

ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
